pages.text: Neko Technology adds two new crops to the world: Catnip and Cat Grass. These materials are mainly used in crafting.

pages.title: Catnip
pages.text: Catnip is a feline favorite! Its unique aroma drives cats wild with excitement. Catnip does not generate naturally in the world. To obtain Catnip Seeds, you'll need to tame some cats. When you sleep, any tamed, sitting cats will hop onto your bed and curl up beside you. Upon waking, there's a chance they'll leave you a morning gift — and that gift may include Catnip Seeds! (This is based on vanilla Minecraft's cat gift mechanic.)
Plant Catnip Seeds on farmland to grow your own catnip.

pages.title: Cat Grass
pages.text: Cat Grass is very common. You can easily find it growing near river biomes in the Overworld.$(br2)Cat Grass can be planted directly on grass blocks or other non-farmland blocks (farmland works too).
